title: Arm AGI CPU explained..
summary: Arm announced its first AGI CPU targeting agentic workloads, entering a highly competitive CPU market. The market is capital-intensive with high time-to-market risk as hyperscalers increasingly customize CPUs for their specific data center architectures, working with TSMC on supply chain management.
